notes: No horizontal scroll or edge clipping at 375px; single quiet column holds at all three widths, including longer rows ('Diamond League Monaco (Herculis EBS)', 'Tour de France 2026' subtitle).
Match/fixture names read in full and unambiguous: Spain – Belgium, Norway – England, Argentina – Switzerland — no truncation hiding either side of a fixture.
Norwegian-channel contract holds: only NRK, NRK 1, TV 2, TV 2 Play, Viaplay, Max +1, Direktesport +1 appear as 'where to watch' — no foreign broadcaster (ESPN/FOX/Sky) at any width.
Round labels (Kvartfinale, Semifinale, Damefinale, Herrefinale) show correctly next to knockout/final fixtures at all widths.
National flag emoji (Spain, Belgium, Norway, England, Argentina, Switzerland) render as real flags, not broken-image boxes.

Must-see accent (left border + tinted background) applied to a meaningful subset tied to followed favorites/importance (Sjakk-NM, Genesis Scottish Open, ISCO Championship, Diamond League Monaco, Norway–England, EFG Swiss Open Gstaad, VM-semifinaler, The Open) rather than every row.
Header, 'Dine neste' tracked list, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger'/'Rediger' links, and footer (Oppdatert / Abonner i kalender / AI-budsjett) intact and aligned at every width.

Could not assess clearly: the tennis icon (Casper Ruud, Wimbledon rows) reads closer to a magnifying-glass glyph than an obvious tennis pictograph at all widths — not clipped or broken, just visually ambiguous which sport it signals at a glance.
No event showed the honest empty '–' channel placeholder in this data snapshot, so that path could not be exercised.
